## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Type of change

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Chore

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran the project locally
- [ ] I ran `npm run build`
- [ ] I ran `npm run lint` when applicable
- [ ] I ran `npm run typecheck` when applicable
- [ ] I did not add secrets, tokens or sensitive data
- [ ] I updated documentation when needed

## Screenshots

Add screenshots or screen recordings for UI changes when possible.
